headlines.description: — The Detroit Lions have been dominant for much of the season, leading the league in point differential after routinely routing opponents.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lions extend win streak to 10 games, hold off Bears for 23-20 victory

events.name: New York Giants at Dallas Cowboys

headlines.description: — DeMarvion Overshown wasn't sure he could run down the pass he tipped and turn it into an interception for a touchdown.
headlines.shortLinkText: Overshown's flashy pick-6 boosts Cowboys in 27-20 Thanksgiving win over Giants

events.name: Miami Dolphins at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Jordan Love celebrated the Green Bay Packers’ victory on Thanksgiving by taking a bite out of a turkey leg and raising it in the air.
headlines.shortLinkText: Love connects with Reed on 2 TDs as Packers use fast start to beat Dolphins 30-17
